reforms.description: Greece aims to better exploit EU structural funds to boost investment in education, research, innovation, and information and communication technology, enhancing skills and human capital. The government also seeks to improve investment in human and knowledge-based capital to allow upgrading in global value chains, particularly in SMEs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in education and skills enhances human capital, which is crucial for productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been put into practice as part of the national strategy for human capital development.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly enhances human capital investment but does not represent a major structural change.
reforms.source_quote: EU structural funds should be better exploited to boost investment in education, research and innovation, and information and communication technology to enhance skills and human capital.

reforms.description: A development bank will be created to help SME funding, improving access to credit for SMEs by systematically organizing all funding opportunities from national and international sources. Additionally, the creation of a venture capital ecosystem with direct links to university research and innovation aims to boost entrepreneurship and promote high value-added products and innovative SMEs.
reforms.component_name: Development Bank and Venture Capital Ecosystem
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing access to funding and fostering a venture capital ecosystem supports the growth of innovative SMEs, which is vital for economic development.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced and is in the planning stages.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a development bank and a venture capital ecosystem represents a significant structural change in SME support.
reforms.source_quote: The creation of a venture capital ecosystem with important direct links to university research and innovation could be a way to boost entrepreneurship.

reforms.description: The Greek government plans to introduce a New Investment Incentives Law aimed at supporting small and medium-sized projects that combine high quality and value-added tourism products.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Supporting high-quality tourism projects can enhance economic growth and attract investment.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced and is in the legislative process.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant for the tourism sector but does not represent a major overhaul of the investment framework.
reforms.source_quote: In 2016 a New Investment Incentives Law is planned to be introduced, which will rely on small and medium sized projects combining high quality and value added tourism products.
